vision_profile.current_state: Karan is a QA Automation Engineer with 5 years of experience, proficient in Java, Selenium, and basic Jenkins, seeking to elevate his role beyond scripting.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is transitioning from automation scripting to designing robust test frameworks, integrating CI/CD, and mastering backend testing.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is motivated to ensure QA is recognized as an engineering discipline, driving quality through architectural design and deep technical contributions.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You will solidify your core programming skills, understand advanced automation principles, and begin designing modular test frameworks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the engineering bedrock to transform automation into robust, scalable quality systems.

modules.title: Advanced Python for Automation
lessons: Advanced Data Structures & Algorithms in Python
Working with External Libraries & Package Management

video.title: Working with JSON and XML in Python

science.desc: You encounter a flaky test in a Python automation suite. Analyze the code to identify potential race conditions or improper resource handling and propose a fix.

modules.title: Object-Oriented Design for Test Automation
lessons: Review of OOP Principles (Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism)
Design Patterns for Test Automation (Page Object Model, Factory)
Abstraction and Interfaces in Test Frameworks
Refactoring Legacy Test Code with OOP

skills.title: Applying SOLID Principles to Test Frameworks

scenario.title: Refactoring a Monolithic Test Class with SOLID

skills.title: Page Object Model & Test Design Patterns

video.title: Implementing Page Object Model in Java

science.desc: Explain how you would design a robust and maintainable test automation framework for a complex web application, emphasizing OOP principles.

modules.title: Advanced Test Automation with Selenium & Java
lessons: Cross-Browser and Parallel Testing with Selenium Grid
Introduction to BDD with Cucumber for Java

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You will design and implement scalable test frameworks, master API testing, and validate service contracts effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the architect of reliable and efficient test systems, ensuring quality at the API level.

science.desc: Describe the key components of a robust and scalable test automation framework. How would you ensure its maintainability and extensibility?

modules.title: Deep Dive into API Testing & Contract Validation
lessons: Advanced API Testing with Rest Assured (Java)
Introduction to API Contract Testing (Pact, OpenAPI)
Mocking and Stubbing External API Dependencies

video.title: Mastering Rest Assured for API Automation

science.desc: A new microservice is being developed. Design a strategy for API contract testing to ensure compatibility with existing services and prevent breaking changes.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You will integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines, implement quality gates, and conduct basic performance and load testing.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the guardian of continuous quality, embedding testing seamlessly into the development lifecycle.

modules.title: CI/CD Pipelines for SDET
lessons: Integrating Automated Tests into Jenkins Pipelines
Containerization with Docker for Test Environments

scenario.title: Troubleshooting a Failed CI/CD Quality Gate

video.title: Containerizing Your Test Suite with Docker

science.desc: How would you integrate a comprehensive automation test suite into an existing CI/CD pipeline, ensuring fast feedback and reliable deployments?

video.title: Building Basic Load Tests with JMeter
Tools and Techniques for Bottleneck Identification

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You will master backend service testing, including database interactions, data integrity, and security testing fundamentals.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the deep-dive quality engineer, ensuring the robustness and integrity of the system's core services and data.

modules.title: Backend Service Testing & Mocking
lessons: Security Testing Basics for Backend Services

scenario.title: Setting up Virtual Services for Integration Testing

science.desc: A new payment gateway microservice is introduced. Design a testing strategy that includes service virtualization and basic security checks.

modules.title: Database Testing & Data Integrity
lessons: Data Masking and Test Data Generation

video.title: Writing Effective SQL Queries for Tests

science.desc: How would you approach testing a complex data migration process from a relational database to a NoSQL database, ensuring data integrity throughout?

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You will design and implement testing strategies for complex distributed systems, microservices, and cloud-native applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the expert in navigating the complexities of modern distributed architectures, ensuring their resilience and reliability.

modules.title: Testing Distributed Systems & Microservices
lessons: Observability and Monitoring for Distributed Tests

video.title: Strategies for Testing Complex Distributed Architectures
Principles of Chaos Engineering for Resilience

scenario.title: Designing a Chaos Experiment for a Microservice

science.desc: How would you design an end-to-end testing strategy for a complex e-commerce platform built on a microservices architecture deployed in the cloud?

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You will lead SDET initiatives, define comprehensive test strategies, mentor junior engineers, and drive quality across the product lifecycle.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a leader, shaping the future of quality engineering and empowering teams to deliver exceptional products.

scenario.title: Developing a Test Strategy for a New Product Launch

science.desc: As an SDET Lead, how would you foster a strong quality culture within a fast-paced development team, balancing speed and reliability?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You will explore cutting-edge testing techniques, including AI/ML in testing, and contribute to the strategic direction of quality engineering.
milestones.identity_statement: You are an innovator, pushing the boundaries of quality engineering and integrating advanced technologies to redefine testing.

modules.title: AI/ML in Testing & Advanced Tooling
lessons: Introduction to AI/ML for Test Automation

skills.title: Future Trends in SDET & Quality Engineering

science.desc: Your company is exploring integrating Generative AI for test data generation. Evaluate the pros and cons and propose a pilot project plan.
